name: jackpotjunction.com
message: [AI generated] Jackpot Junction is a Minnesota-based casino hotel owned and managed by the Lower Sioux Indian Community. With 440,000 square feet of gaming space, it offers a variety of games such as slot machines, blackjack, poker, bingo, etc. It also features a hotel with 378 rooms, restaurants, convention center, live shows, golf course, and other amenities.
